name: Bulgarian Meatball Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove most of the seeds from the chiles.
2. Combine beef, rice, paprika, and savory in a bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Mix lightly but thoroughly.
3. Form into 1-inch balls, then roll in flour.
4. In a large kettle, combine water, bouillon cubes, 1 tablespoon salt, 1 teaspoon pepper, green onions, green bell pepper, carrots, and tomatoes. Bring to boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Add meatballs, cover, and bring to boil again. Reduce heat and simmer for another 20 minutes.
6. Add chiles and simmer, covered, for an additional 40 minutes or until rice is cooked.
7. Add parsley during the last 5 minutes of cooking time. Taste and add more salt and pepper if needed.
8. Just before serving, beat egg with lemon juice. Stir 1 to 2 tablespoons hot soup into egg mixture, then stir egg mixture into soup. Heat and stir until soup is thickened slightly, but do not allow to boil.
